Variables.Name: TwistDrive
Variables.Description: Controls the twist (roll) constraint drive between current orientationvelocity and target orientationvelocity. This is available as long as the twist limit is set to free or limited.

Variables.Name: SwingDrive
Variables.Description: Controls the cone constraint drive between current orientationvelocity and target orientationvelocity. This is available as long as there is at least one swing limit set to free or limited.

Variables.Name: SlerpDrive
Variables.Description: Controls the SLERP (spherical lerp) drive between current orientationvelocity and target orientationvelocity. NOTE: This is only available when all three angular limits are either free or limited. Locking any angular limit will turn off the drive implicitly.

Variables.Name: OrientationTarget
Variables.Description: Target orientation relative to the the body reference frame.

Variables.Name: AngularVelocityTarget
Variables.Description: Target angular velocity relative to the body reference frame.

Variables.Name: AngularDriveMode
Variables.Description: Whether motors use SLERP (spherical lerp) or decompose into a Swing motor (cone constraints) and Twist motor (roll constraints). NOTE: SLERP will NOT work if any of the angular constraints are locked.
